name: Cohiba - Robusto
smokingTime: 50-60 mins Uniquely amongst Habanos, Cohiba's filler leaves undergo an additional fermentation in barrels
notes: Rich, medium-to-full cigar with deep spice, wood, and signature Cohiba complexity from additional fermentation.

name: Cohiba - Shorts (10)
notes: A compact Cuban classic with Cohiba's signature creaminess and smooth, refined balance.

name: Cohiba - Siglo II
smokingTime: 30 mins The Cohiba Siglo Il is a Cuban cigar, part of the Linea 1492 range, introduced in 1994 to commemorate the 500th anniversary of Columbus' arrival in the New World
notes: Medium-bodied Cuban cigar with refined balance, smooth cedar, subtle spice, and a clean, elegant finish.

name: Cohiba - Wide Shorts (6)
notes: Bold and full in a small format — rich, earthy, and unmistakably Cohiba.

name: Montecristo - Edmundo
smokingTime: 45 - 60 min Named after Alexandre Dumas' hero Edmundo Dantes in 'The Count of Montecristo' ', the Edmundo was one of the first extra heavy gauge, parejo sizes produced in Cuba in the 21st century
notes: Medium-to-full bodied robusto delivering bold pepper, earth, and satisfying richness.

name: Montecristo - No.2
notes: Iconic full-flavored pyramides with pepper, cocoa, and a rich, evolving profile.

name: Montecristo No.4
smokingTime: 30 mins The enduringly popular Montecristo No
notes: Balanced and approachable with creamy texture, cocoa, and light spice notes.

name: Partagas - Serie D No.4
notes: Full-bodied classic with bold spice, earth, and deep, rich character.

name: Partagas - Serie Pyramides No.2
notes: Strong pyramides offering cocoa, pepper, earth, and complex spice layers.

name: Romeo Y Julieta - Short Churchill
smokingTime: 45 mins Romeo y Julieta is a current pre-Revolution brand, launched around the 1850s and was officially registered in 1873
notes: Medium-bodied robusto with balanced wood, earth, and light spice.

name: Bolivar - Belicoso Fino
smokingTime: 60 mins The Bolivar Belicosos Finos is recognized as one of the strongest cigars in the Bolivar range, offering a full-bodied smoke with notes of spice, wood, leather, chocolate, salt, and hints of fruit
notes: Full-bodied cigar with leather, spice, chocolate, and a powerful, smooth profile.

name: Bolivar - Royal Corona
smokingTime: 45 mins Bolivar Royal Corona is a highly-regarded Cuban cigar, renowned fo its rich heritage and bold flavors
notes: Medium-full cigar with earthy richness, wood, and herbal complexity.

name: Davidoff - Churchill - The Late Hour
notes: Medium-full cigar with pepper, oak, espresso, and deep richness.

name: Davidoff Yamasa Petit Churchill
notes: Complex medium-full cigar with spice, earth, and bold character.

name: The Davidoff Signature 2000
notes: Mild and elegant with creamy texture, wood, and floral nuances.

name: Hoyo de Monterrey - Epicure Especial
smokingTime: 45-60 mins The Epicure Especial known for its light-to-medium-bodied profile, offering a rich, creamy, and complex smoking experience
notes: Smooth, creamy cigar with notes of cocoa, coffee, leather, and soft spice.

name: Hoyo de Monterrey - Epicure No. 2
smokingTime: 45 mins Hoyo de Monterrey is a current pre-Revolution brand, established in 1865
notes: Mild-medium cigar with creamy texture, cedar, and light, approachable character.

name: H.Upmann - Half Corona
notes: Light-medium cigar, smooth and subtle with approachable flavor progression.

name: H.Upmann - Mag 46
smokingTime: 60-95 mins known for a medium-bodied, creamy, and refined smoke
notes: Medium-bodied refined smoke with cedar, nuts, coffee, and balanced creaminess.

name: Trinidad - Media Luna
smokingTime: 40 mins Trinidad Media luna has notes of cedar, honey, leather, and nuttiness,
notes: Balanced cigar with notes of leather, nuttiness, and subtle sweetness.

name: Trinidad - Shorts (10)
notes: A smooth, delicate petit corona with Trinidad's signature elegance and subtle complexity.

name: Trinidad - Vigia
smokingTime: 45 mins Trinidad is one of the anomalies within Cuba's collection of cigar brands
notes: Creamy medium-bodied cigar with honey, cedar, and signature smooth richness.

name: AJ Fernandez Dias de Gloria Brazil Corona
notes: Medium-full cigar with Brazilian sweetness, spice, and complexity.

name: AJ Fernandez New World Dorado - Robusto
notes: Full-bodied cigar with earth, spice, and natural tobacco richness.

name: Arturo Fuente-Hemingway "Short story"
notes: Smooth mild-medium cigar with cedar, spice, and slight sweetness.

name: Ashton VSG Eclipse
notes: Full-bodied cigar with powerful spice, earth, and refined strength.

name: JC newman 'Brick House ' Habano
notes: Medium cigar with cocoa, earth, cedar, and pepper.

name: Cusano Honduras - Churchill
notes: Medium-full cigar with spice, oak, and earthy balance.

name: Cusano Honduras - Robusto
notes: Medium-full cigar with spice, oak, and earthy balance.

name: Cusano Honduras - Toro
notes: Medium-full cigar with spice, oak, and earthy balance.

name: E.P. Carrillo - Pledge Prequel
notes: Full-bodied cigar with spice, espresso, dark fruit, and complexity.

name: Esteban Carreras - Cashmere Boolit
notes: Mild-medium cigar with cream, wood, and soft spice.

name: Esteban Carreras - Mr. Brownstone
notes: Medium-full cigar with cocoa, coffee, citrus, and pepper.

name: Henry Clay - Warhawk Robusto
notes: Mild-medium cigar with balanced earth, spice, and structure.

name: Jose L. Piedra - Cazadores
notes: Light-medium cigar with rustic earth, wood, and traditional Cuban profile.

name: Joya de Nicaragua Red Robusto
notes: Medium-bodied cigar with caramel, nuts, citrus, and soft spice.

name: Juan Lopez - Seleccion No.2
smokingTime: 45 mins The cigar is known for its medium to full strength and offers a complex flavor profile with notes of wood, herbs, and earthiness
notes: Medium-bodied cigar with woody, herbal, and lightly spiced character.

name: My Father 'Le Bijou 1922' torpedo
notes: Bold cigar with deep earth, spice, and intense character.

name: The My Father 'Flor de las Antillas' Toro
notes: Full-bodied cigar with coffee, leather, and peppery richness.

name: Azan white campana
notes: Medium-bodied cigar with sweet notes and refined smoothness.

name: League of Fat Bastards - Serie O
notes: Full-bodied cigar with cherry, cocoa, earth, and spice.

name: League of Fat Bastards Serie L
notes: Medium-bodied cigar with cedar, cocoa, and balanced spice.

name: Nicatabaco Factory Blend No. 2 Toro Deluxe
notes: Medium-bodied cigar with aromatic and balanced Nicaraguan profile.

name: Oliva Serie V Double Robusto
notes: Rich medium-full cigar with coffee, spice, and subtle citrus.

name: Punch - Short de punch
notes: Medium-full cigar with cedar, spice, and earthy balance.

name: Quai d'Orsay 50
notes: Smooth and elegant with vanilla, cedar, and hazelnut notes.

name: Rocky Patel Edge B52 Corojo
notes: Medium-full cigar with earthy, creamy, and consistent flavor.

name: Rocky Patel Vintage 1999 Connecticut Junior
notes: Mild cigar with creamy texture and smooth Connecticut profile.

name: Rocky Patel Vintage 1999 Connecticut Robusto
notes: Mild cigar with creamy texture and smooth Connecticut profile.

name: Villa Zamorano - Robusto
notes: Medium cigar with smooth complexity and balanced intensity.
